'''''InQuest'' 39''' was a roleplaying magazine from [[July]] [[1998]]. It contained many articles, including an addition to the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|Customizable Card Game]] (CCG) called "[[Mirror, Mirror]]," which was written by [[Michael Mikaelian]] and [[Jason Robinette]], as well as an article called "[[Terminators: Five Movie Monsters to Torment Your PCs]]," written by [[Kenneth Hite]], with suggestions for using movie monsters in the [[West End Games]] ''Star Wars'' D6 system and non-''Star Wars'' gaming systems.

In "Mirror, Mirror," [[Wizard Entertainment]] gave an explanation for the ''Star Trek'' and ''[[Star Wars]]'' universes being joined, so that CCG players could use the two systems together.
